→

Go to Dashboard | St. Cloud Area School District 742

https://isd742.us001-rapididentity.com/ui/dashboard

1

Click the "Securly Classroom" link

→

Go to Classes | Securly Classroom

https://org5887.deviceconsole.securly.com/classroom/#/classes/main/list/gridview/1

2

Click the div element

3

Click the "close" button

4

Click the "Active Sessions" link

→

Go to Active Sessions | Securly Classroom

https://org5887.deviceconsole.securly.com/classroom/#/classes/main/activesessions/1

5

Click the "Session History" link

→

Go to Session History | Securly Classroom

https://org5887.deviceconsole.securly.com/classroom/#/classes/main/sessionhistory/1

6

Click the "Devices" link

→

Go to Chrome Devices | Securly Classroom

https://org5887.deviceconsole.securly.com/classroom/#/devices/chrome

7

Click the "Classes" link

→

Go to Classes | Securly Classroom

https://org5887.deviceconsole.securly.com/classroom/#/classes/main/list/gridview/1

8

Click the "Web Links" link
